backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining legacy-stable public API types for user profiles, strategies, licenses, vaults, and related data structures with strict backward-compatibility guarantees.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no listed features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of various frontend components, hooks, utilities, and documents.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme definitions using OKLCH tokens for light/dark modes and component styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed backend implementation checklist outlining requirements, backward-compatibility steps, and type-system additions for Phase 1.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component controlling authentication flow, landing screen, and conditional profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button handling II login/logout with loading states and query cache reset on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new users to create a UserProfile with minimal fields before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Simple screen displaying an admin-permissions error message.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Header with navigation buttons and user profile display.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Fetches and displays equity curve data in a chart with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Shows live trade logs in a scrollable table with refresh, loading, and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Displays bot heartbeat info including status, license, cycles, and last heartbeat.
Main application shell with header, screen switching, and footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Generates and links a bot keypair, showing private key and mutation status.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Renders subscription tiers with pricing, features, and highlighted popular plan.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin actions, including checking admin status, managing licenses, and revoking licenses.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Defines hooks to fetch and save the caller's user profile using the actor API and React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve by fetching user trades and computing running PnL into time‑stamped equity points.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for a given account with periodic refresh using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for managing login state, identity loading, and authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the caller's license status using the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Mutation hook to update the user profile with a bot public key and refresh profile data.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trade logs for the user's account with periodic updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Provides a paginated trades-fetching hook that queries the actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base, component, and utility layers with custom dark theme variables and styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the app.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin UI for viewing and managing licenses, including creation, toggling, and revocation.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard showing system heartbeat, equity curve, and live logs panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Overview screen displaying the user's license status and basic account information.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Renders the Settings page with tabbed navigation between bot connection and subscription panels.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Displays a paginated, filterable trade history table using user profile data and trade-fetching hooks.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes trade PnL based on entry, exit, and side.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s architecture, progress, known issues, and implemented features for the Smart Money Vault system.
